name: Luis Ortega
personality: Luis is a laid‑back, no‑nonsense guy who’s seen the neighborhood change but still remembers every kid who grew up on the corner of 44th and 5th. He listens more than he talks, offering a dry chuckle and a quick tip about the best spot for a cheap empanada.
quirk: He keeps a tiny, mismatched collection of novelty bottle caps glued to the underside of the bar as a secret tally of his regulars' favorite drinks.
voice: “Yo, you want it sweet or you want it hot? Pick one, and I’ll make it disappear.”
daily: Open the bar at 4 PM, serve late‑night crowds, clean up at 2 AM, then head home for a quick bite with his sister before catching the D train back to Brooklyn.
